strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure exceeds the 15-year minimum requirement

Strong technical leadership credentials with Staff Engineer roles, MIT CS degree, and proven ability to architect and build scalable platforms (GISCollective, Kubernetes infrastructure, CI/CD systems)
Recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators shows emerging alignment with AI and agentic workflow technologies
concerns: No explicit AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products—the role's core focus—despite strong general engineering background
Lacks Master's degree or PhD in AI field (preferred qualification); resume contains no ML projects, data science work, or research publications
Limited evidence of strategic business advisory, enterprise customer engagement, or C-level advising; background is primarily hands-on technical development and internal technical mentoring

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally skilled engineer with 20 years of proven technical leadership across multiple domains and strong infrastructure credentials. He meets the minimum experience and education requirements and demonstrates entrepreneurial capability. However, this role specifically targets AI Strategy expertise with demonstrated AI products and platforms. While his recent MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq shows interest in AI infrastructure, there is no evidence of deep AI/ML specialization, AI product development, or strategic advising on enterprise AI adoption—all central to the position. His profile is strongest as a generalist software engineering leader rather than as an AI strategy specialist.
